description_long: This is a rectangular cowshed with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown corrugated panels. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and functional appearance. The front features large double barn doors with visible black metal hinges and latches, suitable for livestock entry and equipment access. On one side, there is a lean-to extension with a matching sloped roof supported by wooden posts, likely used for sheltering equipment or animals. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground on concrete footings, providing stability and protection from moisture. There are no visible windows, and the design prioritizes practicality and durability typical of agricultural outbuildings.
description: A wooden cowshed with a red gable roof, large double barn doors, and a lean-to side extension. The structure is rustic, practical, and elevated on concrete footings.
description_view_0: Front view showing large double barn doors with black metal hardware and the attached lean-to extension on the left.
description_view_1: Side gable end view displaying the plain wooden plank wall with no doors or windows, and the full height of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous wooden plank wall and the lean-to extension on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end view with a plain wooden wall and visible concrete footings, no doors or windows.
attribute_door_style: double sliding barn door, wooden with black metal hardware
